violations.description: Contaminated food disposition. — --Potentially hazardous food held for greater than four hours between 41F and 140F was not discarded when conditions require. -Corn dog appeared visibly old/hard and found with temp of 126F. *Disposed of immediately.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Green debris at upper exterior edges of soda machine ice chutes. -Some debris at upper edge of interior panel of the ice machine.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -High dust at ceiling and fans in walk in cooler.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. -Blue chemical in spry bottle labeled for Kay Peroxide cleaner. (belongs to Icee service Rep). -Unknown chemical in unlabeled spray bottle stored near 3 comp sink.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
